A '''species''' of [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Bird/Legends|birds]] was present on the [[Tree/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] kept one in his hut around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], as he showed the [[Towani family|Towani]] children the whereabouts of their parents using a [[crystal image spinner]].

==Biology and appearance==
They were [[Bird/Legends|birds]] of prey, the head of which resembled that of the sentient [[Rishii/Legends|Rishii]].<ref name="AE">''[[Alien Encounters]]''</ref> They had speckled [[Color/Legends|brown]] and tan plumage, with feathery ear tufts. They also had a hooked beak and glowing yellow eyes.<ref name="BFE" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|In ''Caravan of Courage'' we can also see an owl in Logray's hut and some goats looking high on a hill for a lonely Ewok goatherd.|Tim Veekhoven and Mark Newbold|<ref name="Blog">{{SW|url=news/drawing-from-the-present-familiar-creatures-in-a-galaxy-far-far-away|text=Drawing from the Present: Familiar Creatures in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|int=Back from the Drawing Board|nolive=1}}</ref>}}
In [[Back from the Drawing Board|''Drawing from the Present: Familiar Creatures in a Galaxy Far, Far Away'']], a [[2013]] article written for the [[Star Wars Blog]] by [[Tim Veekhoven]] and [[Mark Newbold]], owls were mentioned among the many real-world animals that appeared in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' live-action movies.<ref name="Blog" />

==Appearances==
